About Horizon Kitchen Remodel

12+ years serving Chicago and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012 by Chicago native Mark Reynolds, Horizon Kitchen Remodel began with a mission to preserve the architectural integrity of local homes while introducing contemporary conveniences. What started as a two-person operation in Logan Square has grown into a team serving the entire metro area.

We approach every project with Midwestern pragmatism and designer sensibilities. Our process balances meticulous planning with adaptability for Chicago's unpredictable weather and aging home quirks. Cabinetry is test-fitted in our West Town workshop before installation to account for settling foundations.

When we're not remodeling kitchens, you'll find our team volunteering at neighborhood housing initiatives or sponsoring local Little League teams. We believe beautiful spaces should be accessible to all Chicagoans.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Horizon Kitchen Remodel

Trusted kitchen remodel professionals serving Chicago, IL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
